languages.text: {n}Эоганн нехотя кивает.{/n} "Требование удовлетворено — я готов разделить знания и методики с магосом Ханейманном, если это позволит мне продолжить эксперименты и убедить его в чистоте моих помыслов и деяний. Нунциус является свидетелем сего технообета".

{n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн нехотя кивает.{/n} "Требование удовлетворено — я готов разделить знания и методики с магосом Ханейманном, если это позволит мне продолжить эксперименты и убедить его в чистоте моих помыслов и деяний. Нунциус является свидетелем сего технообета".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfied. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuntius shall bear witness to this techno-oath."

{n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nickt zögerlich.{/n} "Die Voraussetzung ist zufriedenstellend. Ich bin bereit, mein Wissen und meine Methoden mit Magos Haneumann zu teilen, sofern ich dadurch meine Experimente fortsetzen darf, um ihn von der Reinheit meiner Gedanken und Taten zu überzeugen. Nuncius wird diesen Tech-Schwur bezeugen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn nickt zögerlich.{/n} "Die Voraussetzung ist zufriedenstellend. Ich bin bereit, mein Wissen und meine Methoden mit Magos Haneumann zu teilen, sofern ich dadurch meine Experimente fortsetzen darf, um ihn von der Reinheit meiner Gedanken und Taten zu überzeugen. Nuncius wird diesen Tech-Schwur bezeugen."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hoche la tête avec réticence.{/n} « Cela me convient. Je suis prêt à partager mes connaissances et mes méthodes avec le magos Haneumann, tant qu'on m'autorise à poursuivre mes expériences et que j'ai l'opportunité de le convaincre de la pureté de mes pensées et de mes actes. Nuncius sera témoin de ce technoserment. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hoche la tête avec réticence.{/n} « Cela me convient. Je suis prêt à partager mes connaissances et mes méthodes avec le magos Haneumann, tant qu'on m'autorise à poursuivre mes expériences et que j'ai l'opportunité de le convaincre de la pureté de mes pensées et de mes actes. Nuncius sera témoin de ce technoserment. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡勉强点了点头。{/n}“此请求尚可接受。我准备向哈努曼贤者分享我的知识和方法，前提是这能让我继续实验，并证明我思想与行为的绝对纯洁。努恩修斯将见证这项技术誓言。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡勉强点了点头。{/n}“此请求尚可接受。我准备向哈努曼贤者分享我的知识和方法，前提是这能让我继续实验，并证明我思想与行为的绝对纯洁。努恩修斯将见证这项技术誓言。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn asiente a regañadientes.{/n} «El requisito es aceptable. Estoy dispuesto a compartir mis conocimientos y metodología con el magos Haneumann, siempre que al hacerlo se me permita continuar mis experimentos para convencerlo de la pureza de mis pensamientos y acciones. Nuncius será testigo del tecnojuramento».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn asiente a regañadientes.{/n} «El requisito es aceptable. Estoy dispuesto a compartir mis conocimientos y metodología con el magos Haneumann, siempre que al hacerlo se me permita continuar mis experimentos para convencerlo de la pureza de mis pensamientos y acciones. Nuncius será testigo del tecnojuramento».

languages.text: {n}エオグンは渋々うなずいた。{/n}"その条件は満足のいくものだ。私の知識と方法をマゴス・ハネウマンと共有する用意がある。これで実験を続け、私の思想と行いの純粋さを彼に納得してもらえるなら。ヌンシウスがこの技術的誓約の証人となる"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius shall bear witness to this tech-oath."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn isteksizce başını sallıyor.{/n} "Gereklilik tatmin edici. Bana deneylerime devam etme ve onu düşüncelerimin ve eylemlerimin saflığına ikna etme imkânı sağlaması koşuluyla, bilgi birikimimi ve yöntemlerimi Magos Haneumann ile paylaşmaya hazırım. Nuncius, bu tekno yemine şahitlik edecek."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods reluctantly.{/n} "The requirement is satisfactory. I am prepared to share my knowledge and methods with Magos Haneumann, provided this allows me to continue my experiments and convince him of the purity of my thoughts and deeds. Nuncius will bear witness to this tech-oath."

Bana deneylerime devam etme ve onu düşüncelerimin ve eylemlerimin saflığına ikna etme imkânı sağlaması koşuluyla, bilgi birikimimi ve yöntemlerimi Magos Haneumann ile paylaşmaya hazırım. Nuncius, bu tekno yemine şahitlik edecek."
